global_prompt: Create a high-resolution photorealistic live-action reconstruction of the attached original Curse of the Azure Bonds image. COMPOSITION LOCK: preserve the exact 1:1 source crop, camera angle, horizon, silhouettes, major bounding boxes, count, scale, facing directions, negative space, and foreground/middle/background allocation. Grounded prestige live-action Forgotten Realms fantasy: late-medieval practical materials, natural skin, cloth, leather, timber, stone and metal, physically coherent light, restrained cinematic grading, subtle atmospheric depth, rich fine detail and serious tone. Match or exceed PIC1_block_080_village.png realism.
global_constraints: No text, border, logo, UI, watermark, modern object, extra person/creature/limb, unrelated decoration, cartoon, anime, painterly or generic concept-art look, plastic CGI, glossy cosplay, saturation bloom, altered crop, or shallow focus that hides a key subject. Output a clean 1024x1024 image.

groups.scene: Close cropped diagonal magic object: a silver-gray sword or wand shaft rises from lower left to upper right, its ornate pale hooked/serpentine head at upper right; yellow ribbon-like magical energy loops behind it on black, with small bright green and blue fragments at lower right. Object occupies about 70% of diagonal.
groups.prompt: Photoreal macro still life of the described diagonal silver ritual weapon, weathered engraved steel and ivory-like carved head, suspended golden magical filaments against near-black void; retain the small colored fragments and exact diagonal silhouette.
groups.constraints: Keep black negative space dominant; do not turn the object into a firearm or add a hand.

groups.scene: Night campsite in a wide low composition: ochre ground in lower quarter, small campfire at x=0.30, a low reclining camper beside it, and a tan triangular tent from x=0.48 to 0.95; black mountains form a sawtooth upper half beneath a deep cobalt star-speckled sky.
groups.shared_scene_identity: Same empty mountain campsite, same tiny prone camper, tent geometry, fire pit, mountain skyline and locked camera in every frame.
groups.prompt: Photoreal moonlit mountain campsite as described, low firelight warming the earth and canvas tent, cold cobalt night sky and deep black mountain silhouettes; preserve the large sky negative space.
groups.constraints: No extra campers, trees, moon, buildings, or changed tent shape.
frames: Fire at its smallest, compact orange ember glow.
Same scene; flame leans slightly right and is marginally taller.
Same scene; flame rises vertically into its tallest narrow tongue.
Same scene; flame settles to a short compact flicker.

groups.scene: Daylight village-yard vista: a red clay-tiled, white-plastered timber cottage spans the middle (roof x=0.08–0.93, y=0.18–0.54); dirt yard fills lower half, fence/gate at lower left, dark open door at x=0.68, hens clustered lower center/right, green trees and blue sky behind.
groups.prompt: Photoreal sunlit rural Forgotten Realms cottage yard, the exact low gabled tile roof and white timber-and-plaster facade, rough wooden gate, packed earth, hens and leafy background; documentary-like natural daylight and tangible materials.
groups.constraints: Keep all cottage openings, fence, hens and broad roof position; no people or fantasy castle.

groups.scene: Identical diagonal magical weapon/object composition as PIC1-001: silver shaft lower-left to upper-right, hooked carved head, looping yellow energy on black, colored fragments low-right.
groups.prompt: Photoreal macro reconstruction of the diagonal engraved silver ritual weapon with pale carved head and golden magical filaments, exact 70% diagonal placement on black.
groups.constraints: No hand or modern weapon.

groups.scene: A single hulking green humanoid monster stands front-facing against pure black, centered x=0.50; head y=0.08–0.28, broad shoulders y=0.28–0.48, bent arms and clawed hands extend to x=0.10 and x=0.89, torso to y=0.82; gray rock/cloth triangular base below.
groups.shared_scene_identity: Same gaunt green undead/reptilian humanoid, staring face, scarred chest, ragged gray lower garment, black void and locked full-body framing for all eight frames.
groups.prompt: Photoreal full-body practical-creature portrait of the described centered green humanoid menace, wet textured green skin, sharp claws, bony chest and ragged dark gray loincloth, isolated in black studio-like void; preserve its exact squat stance and proportions.
groups.constraints: Exactly one creature; no weapon, background, extra heads, or anatomy change.
frames: Right hand (viewer left) held low; left arm bent with small open claw.
Same body; left claw extends outward one hand-width farther.
Same body; left claw retracts slightly, fingers curl.
Same body; left arm fully reaches sideways, hand near x=0.90.
Same body; left arm becomes a long horizontal extension across right side, fingers splayed.
Same body; left arm returns to the mid-extended pose.
Same body; left claw returns near the torso, fingers curled.
Same body; left claw again slightly outward, matching the small-open-claw pose.

groups.scene: Surreal monster close-up: huge purple-pink slug/frog-like head dominates lower 75%, its open black tooth-lined mouth centered x=0.45 y=0.58; red single eyeball on a stalk at upper center; a pale patterned leaf/wing intrudes from upper-right, pale cyan sky behind.
groups.shared_scene_identity: Same one-eyed purple amphibian-slug, exact enormous open mouth, eye stalk, cyan background and upper-right patterned appendage across five frames.
groups.prompt: Photoreal grotesque fantasy creature close-up: moist purple amphibian-slug head, cavernous black mouth with irregular pale teeth, solitary red eye on a fleshy stalk, pale cyan haze; retain exact face crop and upper-right appendage.
groups.constraints: One eye only, no tongue or added limbs; preserve mouth opening.
frames: Appendage mostly offscreen; only a small pale segment at upper right.
Same face; appendage swings farther in, an angled pale oval at upper right.
Same face; appendage lifts nearly out of frame, leaving cyan at right.
Same face; appendage returns as small angled pale segment.
Same face; full pale oval patterned appendage visible in upper-right quadrant.

groups.scene: Close cropped bare forearm runs diagonally from lower-left to upper-right on black; a sequence of five glossy blue oval glyphs/gem marks follows its center line, pink-red magical light washes the skin.
groups.shared_scene_identity: Same arm, skin tone, five blue marks, diagonal crop and black void in all frames.
groups.prompt: Photoreal close-up of a human forearm diagonally across black, five embedded blue enamel-like magical glyphs in a row, believable pores and pink-red spell illumination; maintain exact crop.
groups.constraints: No hand beyond cropped upper-right edge and no text/symbol substitutions.
frames: Strong red-pink magical wash across the full forearm.
Magical wash fades; natural skin remains with blue marks crisp.
Red-pink magical wash returns to the initial strength.

groups.scene: Side-on horse-drawn carriage scene: brown covered wagon fills upper/right, pale horse team at lower right moving right, golden spoked wheel lower left, purple-cloaked passenger/driver under the canopy; warm nighttime street texture.
groups.prompt: Photoreal medieval covered wagon and pale horse team in side profile, warm lantern illumination, weathered timber, canvas, harness leather and iron wheel; preserve the compact wagon crop and purple-clad figure.
groups.constraints: Keep one wagon, horse team and wheel; no modern carriage details.

groups.scene: Tight tavern/interior trio: black-cloaked back/shoulder silhouette fills lower-left edge; short dark-haired bearded man in dark tunic center-left; blonde woman in green-and-gold dress center-right; vertical timber wall and glowing lantern behind.
groups.prompt: Photoreal candlelit medieval interior with exactly three figures in the described positions, timber wall, amber lantern, wary dark-haired man and blonde woman in practical green dress.
groups.constraints: Preserve foreground cloak obstruction and three-person count.

groups.scene: Tight forest/wall confrontation: blonde woman’s face cropped at lower-left; broad armored blond man occupies center, crossed/held arms at chest; slender man in green cloak stands right holding a staff or spear; warm vertical brown background.
groups.prompt: Photoreal dramatic medieval trio, dominant broad blond warrior center with leather-and-metal armor, cropped blonde witness foreground left, green-clad companion and staff on right; retain crowded framing.
groups.constraints: Three people only; no helmet, extra weapons, or changed crop.

groups.scene: Centered blue magical sword/obelisk rises vertically from bottom center to y=0.15, framed by symmetrical curling blue-violet smoke/flame on a coral-red field; tiny dark central hilt/face motif.
groups.prompt: Photoreal magical blue steel blade or ritual obelisk, centered vertically, cool luminous energy and smoke curling symmetrically against restrained coral-red magical haze; preserve icon-like symmetry.
groups.constraints: No text, person, extra blade, or asymmetric redesign.

groups.scene: Same locked night campsite as PIC1-029: tiny fire/camper at x=0.30, tan tent x=0.48–0.95, low ochre ground, black mountains and cobalt starry sky.
groups.shared_scene_identity: Same campsite identity, geometry and camera across four frames.
groups.prompt: Photoreal moonlit mountain campsite, exact low tent and tiny fire composition, warm fire/cold sky contrast.
groups.constraints: No extra people, moon, trees or changed tent.
frames: Flame leans slightly right, slightly taller.

groups.scene: Same diagonal magical weapon/object crop: silver shaft lower-left to upper-right, hooked pale head, looping golden magic on black, green/blue debris lower-right.
groups.prompt: Photoreal macro ritual weapon of engraved weathered silver with carved pale hooked head and looping golden magic, exact diagonal silhouette on black.
groups.constraints: No hand or modern object.

groups.scene: Desolate daylight earthscape: rust-orange cracked ground fills nearly all frame, a large irregular black pit/ravine centered from x=0.20–0.78 y=0.38–0.76, scattered pale stones/blue highlights, thin dark distant horizon and orange sky strip.
groups.prompt: Photoreal aerial-low view of a barren rust-red wasteland with a central jagged black sinkhole, cracked clay, scattered pale stones, thin distant dark ridge and dusty orange horizon; preserve the central void shape.
groups.constraints: No people, vegetation, buildings or lava.

groups.scene: Row of four green bald/close-cropped humanoid heads and shoulders packed across the frame above a gray-blue vertical palisade at bottom; largest face centered, partial faces at both edges, cyan-black mist behind.
groups.prompt: Photoreal claustrophobic tableau of four sickly green humanoid faces peering over a weathered gray-blue palisade, centered face largest, cold cyan mist, exact packed head count and frontal gaze.
groups.constraints: Exactly four faces including edge-cropped faces; no extra bodies.

groups.scene: Blonde young woman centered in close-up, wavy hair around head, red/orange bodice and blue belt area; a green clawed arm/creature presses across her chest from left, her right hand grips a tall striped torch/candlestick at left; black background.
groups.prompt: Photoreal close-up of a frightened blonde medieval woman in red-and-blue practical dress, green clawed creature arm restraining her across the chest, striped torch/candlestick rising at left in black darkness; preserve exact overlaps.
groups.constraints: One woman, one green arm only; no extra hands or altered pose.

groups.scene: Giant blue open hand, palm facing viewer, fills frame; five upright fingers from top edge, a glossy single eye embedded in palm at lower center, black-blue magical background.
groups.prompt: Photoreal surreal blue human-like hand palm-forward with one living eye embedded centrally in the palm, wet blue skin and cool magical reflected light, fingers cropped along top edge.
groups.constraints: Exactly five fingers and one palm eye; no body or additional eyes.

groups.scene: Centered hooded green spectral figure seen torso-up, faceless/shadowed head at y=0.12–0.35, enormous mottled green cloak/shoulders widening to x=0.08–0.92 at bottom, purple-black stormy background.
groups.prompt: Photoreal hooded green wraith torso portrait, shadowed faceless hood and huge damp mottled cloak, backlit by dark purple storm haze; maintain symmetric monumental silhouette.
groups.constraints: No visible face, limbs, weapon, or extra figure.

groups.scene: A single green-skinned woman/monster shown chest-up, centered slightly left; curly dark wet hair, pointed ears, pale intense eyes, bare shoulders, diagonal wooden shaft from lower-right to upper-left across her chest; dense green tangled foliage/energy behind.
groups.shared_scene_identity: Same adult green-skinned female creature, hair, eyes, bare-shoulder framing, diagonal wooden shaft and green tangled backdrop across four frames.
groups.prompt: Photoreal chest-up portrait of the described green-skinned female fantasy creature, textured skin, damp curly hair, pointed ears, pale eyes and diagonal wooden staff; preserve exact close crop and expression.
groups.constraints: One subject only; no costume redesign, extra arms, facial alteration or changed staff angle.
frames: She stares slightly toward viewer-right; staff fully crosses chest.
Same pose; eyelids lower into a brief blink, staff unchanged.
Same pose; eyes reopen with gaze slightly more forward, lower-right shoulder/hand edge a little more visible.
Same pose; eyelids lower again into the blink, staff unchanged.

groups.scene: Same locked night campsite: small fire and prone camper near x=0.30, tan triangular tent filling right half, ochre ground, black mountains and cobalt starry sky.
groups.shared_scene_identity: Same campsite, camper, tent, mountains and camera across four frames.
groups.prompt: Photoreal moonlit mountain campsite with exact low horizon and large cobalt sky; realistic canvas, embers and ground.
groups.constraints: No extra person, tent, moon, tree or changed skyline.
frames: Flame leans right and grows a little.
Flame becomes its tallest upright tongue.
Flame settles to short compact ember.

groups.scene: A white swan/goose-like bird faces right in profile across the lower half, long curved neck rising to center; ornate purple-and-gold feathered wing/fan spreads from left edge behind it; pale mint ground and black starry void above with three small pink glowing motes.
groups.prompt: Photoreal white swan in right-facing profile, elegant curved neck and realistic feathers, large ornate purple-and-gold iridescent wing/fan behind it, pale mint misty ground, black magical sky with three pink motes; retain exact profile and cropped wing.
groups.constraints: One bird only; no text, crown, extra wings or scenery.
